appDescription.message: Automatically saves your AI conversations locally. No server. No tracking. 100% private.

statusBar.message: Monitoring claude.ai • Local only • No data leaves your device

emptyDefault.message:
No messages captured yet.
Open claude.ai and start chatting!

confirmClear.message: Delete ALL saved messages? This cannot be undone.

loginNoticeBody.message: Please log in to each AI service before using Share / Orchestrate:

targetsNote.message:
Checked AIs receive messages via Save / Send / Orchestrate.
Right-click → ◈ Orchestra to operate.

waitSliderHint.message: ⚠ If errors occur frequently, move the slider toward Slow.

licenseDefault.message: Enter your license key to unlock Pro or One features.

licenseRemoveConfirm.message: Remove license key and revert to Free plan?

licenseRemoved.message: License removed. Now on Free plan.

upgradeTitle.message: Upgrade — makes it even more powerful

aboutDesc.message:
100% local · No server · No tracking · No API keys stored
Uninstall = all data gone · Your conversations stay yours.

planFreeDesc.message: Save & search conversations · CSV/JSON export · No time limit

planFreeNote.message: The Free plan is fully functional — no features are locked, no nudges to upgrade. Orchestra works completely out of the box, forever, at no cost.

planProDesc.message: 5 AI parallel Orchestration · assign roles · one click to launch

planProNote.message: Pro plan active. Click the 🎼 5AI Orchestra button on any Claude response to launch.

planOneDesc.message: Everything · No API key · Fully autonomous · 100% local

planOneNote.message: One plan active. Use 🎼 5AI Orchestra (semi-auto) or ⚡ Orchestra One (fully autonomous via Playwright).
